text.message: I know that you never deserve to be robbed ever, but your set up is pretty good
blue do you what 6 11 12 or the wood port
im taking the wood port i have rb
ok so can you not plow my road
im not the one getting army
they settle for the win now
i need a wood and a brick
i need 2 more wood or 1 brick
black do you have two ore?
i have no wood or brick
took my shot, now think blue wins
black send the ty card to blue for the win
i think it's a close game
just to ensure blue doesn't win
at least put pressure on black
